prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A circular flow diagram. Top: a structured TypeScript object card with typed fields in a blue glow of safety. Right: an arrow labeled "JSON.stringify()" leads to a plain text JSON string on a scroll, losing its type coloring (now gray/untyped, with a caution strip). Bottom: the JSON string sits in an "untyped zone" with question marks. Left: an arrow labeled "JSON.parse() + validate" leads back up to a typed object, passing through a validation checkpoint that restores the blue type safety glow. A warning icon marks the untyped zone. The cycle flows clockwise.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
